title: Alabama Bar Complaint Template
description: Template complaint to the Alabama State Bar, Office of General Counsel. Includes all required sections for filing a formal attorney discipline complaint in Alabama.
body:
TO: Alabama State Bar, Office of General Counsel
415 Dexter Avenue, Montgomery, AL 36104

DATE: [DATE]

RE: FORMAL COMPLAINT AGAINST ATTORNEY

COMPLAINANT INFORMATION:
Full Name: [YOUR FULL NAME]
Address: [YOUR STREET ADDRESS, CITY, STATE, ZIP]
Phone: [YOUR PHONE NUMBER]
Email: [YOUR EMAIL ADDRESS]
Relationship to Attorney: [CLIENT / OPPOSING PARTY / OTHER]

ATTORNEY COMPLAINED AGAINST:
Full Name: [ATTORNEY FULL NAME]
Bar Number: [BAR NUMBER, IF KNOWN]
Firm/Address: [ATTORNEY LAW FIRM AND ADDRESS]
Phone: [ATTORNEY PHONE, IF KNOWN]
Email: [ATTORNEY EMAIL, IF KNOWN]

STATEMENT OF FACTS:
[Describe the attorney misconduct in detail. Include all relevant dates, amounts of money involved, specific promises made, documents signed, and communications you had with the attorney. Be specific and factual. Attach supporting documents.]

SPECIFIC RULE VIOLATIONS:
The conduct described above appears to violate the following Alabama Rules of Professional Conduct:

- Rule 1.1 (Competence): The attorney failed to provide competent representation by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 1.3 (Diligence): The attorney failed to act with reasonable diligence by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 1.4 (Communication): The attorney failed to keep me reasonably informed by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 1.5 (Fees): The attorney charged unreasonable fees or failed to refund unearned fees by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 1.15 (Safekeeping Property): The attorney mishandled client funds by [DESCRIBE IF APPLICABLE]
- Rule 8.4 (Misconduct): The attorney engaged in conduct involving dishonesty/fraud by [DESCRIBE IF APPLICABLE]

[Note: Include only the rules that apply to your specific situation]

SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION ATTACHED:
[ ] Retainer agreement or engagement letter
[ ] Fee receipts or invoices
[ ] Written communications (letters, emails, texts)
[ ] Court documents showing neglect or errors
[ ] Bank records showing misappropriation
[ ] Other: [DESCRIBE]

RELIEF REQUESTED:
I respectfully request that the Alabama State Bar, Office of General Counsel investigate this complaint and take all appropriate disciplinary action, including but not limited to: formal investigation, filing of formal charges, suspension or revocation of the attorney license, imposition of restitution, and/or such other relief as the Board deems appropriate.

CERTIFICATION:
I declare under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of Alabama that the foregoing information is true and correct to the best of my knowledge, information, and belief.

Signature: _______________________________
Printed Name: [YOUR FULL NAME]
Date: [DATE]

---
This template references Alabama attorney discipline procedures. Contact Alabama State Bar, Office of General Counsel at 415 Dexter Avenue, Montgomery, AL 36104 to confirm current requirements before filing.

body:
TO: North Dakota Commission on Judicial Conduct
600 E. Boulevard Avenue, Dept. 180, Bismarck, ND 58505

DATE: [DATE]

RE: FORMAL COMPLAINT AGAINST JUDICIAL OFFICER

COMPLAINANT INFORMATION:
Full Name: [YOUR FULL NAME]
Address: [YOUR STREET ADDRESS, CITY, STATE, ZIP]
Phone: [YOUR PHONE NUMBER]
Email: [YOUR EMAIL ADDRESS]
Your role: [PARTY / ATTORNEY / WITNESS / COURT OBSERVER / OTHER]

JUDGE COMPLAINED AGAINST:
Full Name: [JUDGE FULL NAME]
Title: [JUDGE / MAGISTRATE / COMMISSIONER / OTHER]
Court: [FULL NAME OF COURT]
County/District: [COUNTY OR JUDICIAL DISTRICT]
Location: [CITY, North Dakota]

CASE INFORMATION (if applicable):
Case Name: [e.g., Smith v. Jones]
Case Number: [DOCKET/CASE NUMBER]
Type of Case: [CIVIL / CRIMINAL / FAMILY / PROBATE / OTHER]
Date(s) of Incident: [DATE OR DATE RANGE]

STATEMENT OF FACTS:
[Describe the judicial misconduct in detail. Include specific dates, case numbers, exact statements made by the judge, actions taken or refused, and how the conduct affected you or the proceedings. Be specific, factual, and objective. Attach supporting documentation such as transcripts or orders.]

SPECIFIC CONDUCT VIOLATIONS:
The conduct described above appears to violate the following provisions of the North Dakota Code of Judicial Conduct:

- Rule 1.1 (Compliance with the Law): The judge failed to comply with the law by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 2.2 (Impartiality and Fairness): The judge failed to apply the law impartially by [DESCRIBE]
- Rule 2.3 (Bias, Prejudice, and Harassment): The judge exhibited bias by [DESCRIBE IF APPLICABLE]
- Rule 2.4 (External Influences): The judge allowed improper influence by [DESCRIBE IF APPLICABLE]
- Rule 2.11 (Disqualification): The judge should have recused but failed to do so because [DESCRIBE IF APPLICABLE]

[Note: Include only the rules that apply to your specific situation]

SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION ATTACHED:
[ ] Certified court transcripts
[ ] Court orders or rulings at issue
[ ] Written communications from the judge
[ ] Witness statements
[ ] News reports or public records
[ ] Other: [DESCRIBE]

RELIEF REQUESTED:
I respectfully request that the North Dakota Commission on Judicial Conduct conduct a thorough investigation and take all appropriate disciplinary action, including but not limited to: private admonishment, public censure, suspension, retirement, or removal from office, and/or such other relief as the Commission deems appropriate.

CERTIFICATION:
I declare under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of North Dakota that the foregoing information is true and correct to the best of my knowledge. I understand that filing a knowingly false complaint may subject me to legal consequences.

Signature: _______________________________
Printed Name: [YOUR FULL NAME]
Date: [DATE]

---
This template references North Dakota judicial conduct procedures. Contact North Dakota Commission on Judicial Conduct at 600 E. Boulevard Avenue, Dept. 180, Bismarck, ND 58505 to confirm current requirements before filing. Judicial conduct complaints are typically confidential during investigation.
